modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into usd.textbookx.com, encountering an error.

full_description_text: User attempts to log into Akedemos online bookstore. They are met with an unhandled exception page. This issue occurs on the usd.textbookx.com site. The login process fails completely, preventing access.
short_description: Unable to log into usd.textbookx.com, encountering an error.
description: User attempts to log into Akedemos online bookstore. They are met with an unhandled exception page. This issue occurs on the usd.textbookx.com site. The login process fails completely, preventing access.
